conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry and Polymer Research Institute, Pohang University of Science and Technology, Pohang, 790-784, Korea
conditions.detector: refractive index detector, UV-visible absorption detector
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Retention independent of molecular weight for PEO block
conditions.evidence_text: The critical condition for the analysis of diblock copolymer was a 68 °C column temperature and an ACN/water mixture at the ratio of 60/40 (v/v).
conditions.notes: Critical condition established using PEG standards (Mn: 1500, 3400, and 8000).

conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry and Polymer Research Institute, Pohang University of Science and Technology, Pohang, 790-784, Korea
conditions.detector: refractive index detector, UV-visible absorption detector
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Retention independent of molecular weight for PEO block
conditions.evidence_text: In the analysis for triblock copolymer, two different critical conditions were used (37 °C, ACN:H2O 47:53 (v/v); 54 °C, ACN: H2O 54:46 (v/v)).
conditions.notes: First condition used for triblock copolymer with shorter PLLA blocks (Figure 3).
